template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Top-down silhouette of a 75% board. Two distinct clusters of coral-splash caps are placed in opposing quadrants — a left cluster (Q, W, A, S) representing the Sovereign deep-ocean-blues colorway and a right cluster (O, P, L, ;) representing the Mutation electric-pink colorway. Both clusters render in the SAME coral hue; the dual-palette idea is conveyed through structural left/right separation rather than literal multi-color. A small coral anchor glyph sits above the top case edge as the King-of-the-Seas nautical nod. Warm-bronze hairlines on the top and bottom case edges only.
brief_summary: Hero art for the news-pillar companion piece to the GMK CYL King of the Seas group-buy listing. Editorial decision captured here for audit: the set ships two concurrent colorways (Sovereign and Mutation), but bearings mandates a single coral splash, so the dual-palette read is structural — two coral clusters in mirrored quadrants (one per colorway thematically) instead of two literal colors. The article remains explicitly NOT painted blue despite Sovereign being a deep-ocean-blues colorway.
composition_decision: two clusters, one color — structural separation across left and right halves of the board substitutes for the literal two-palette story; both clusters use identical coral so the bearings 'single splash' rule is honored

bronze_accent.name: warm-bronze
bronze_accent.usage: 1.5px hairlines on the top and bottom case edges only, 0.65 stroke opacity

tokens_snapshot: design/tokens.css — --kh-accent oklch(0.80 0.135 75); coral splash from canonical hero-art coral family
layout_choice: 75% — single committed layout. 1020×410 case rectangle, six rows (F-row, number, top alpha, home, bottom alpha, modifier+spacebar), single right-side nav column tell.

nautical_glyph.position: centered above the top case edge at (600, 150)
nautical_glyph.scale: ~56px tall — deliberately small to nod without dominating

style_guide: bearings.md § Article hero art (locked 2026-05-09): 2px warm-grey stroke throughout; single splash (coral) on accent caps + tiny anchor glyph; warm-bronze accent on case edges only; no multi-color, no blues or greens; transparent canvas.
xml_validity: validated — no double-hyphen runs inside comments; parses as well-formed XML
